rationale: The cited paper appears directly relevant to the citing paper’s core mechanism: both analyze music-platform social-network behavior, and the citing note highlights early interactivity/social-capital signals as key predictors of later success while the cited note provides dynamic evidence that networking activities and ego-network structure drive song plays over time. With this strong construct and context overlap (plus an exact DOI match), the pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
